title: Exact alarms should not be abused
description: Using exact alarms excessively can negatively impact device battery life and performance. Developers should avoid abusing exact alarms unless absolutely necessary.
recommendation: Use inexact alarms or other scheduling mechanisms when possible to reduce battery consumption.
impact: Abusing exact alarms can lead to increased battery drain and poor user experience.

checks.message: Use inexact alarms or other scheduling mechanisms when possible to reduce battery consumption.
